discussion_comments.comment_body:
**suggestion**: Is there any chance you can add a description and a type for the two params you added?

The other ones are okay, since they're pre-existing.

```suggestion
 * @param _vertexText
 * @param style
 * @param isTitle
 * @param isNode
 * @param {boolean} [addBackground] - What does this do?
 * @param {number} [width] - What does this do?
 * @deprecated svg-util/createText instead
```
No longer required after the changes in a2debc2d93a377dd3e46536f76dc1b4dbb64b89b
